chunks.text: Bioinspired Adhesion Bibliography Bioinspired Adhesion Bibliography A small collection of some bioinspired adhesives papers, for adhesives which use wet adhesion or other non-gecko-like principles. This list is not intended to be comprehensive. (Star

is list is not intended to be comprehensive. (Started Sept. 2013.) Please see Gecko Adhesion Bibliography for the complete bibliography of papers related to synthetic gecko adhesion. Kovalev, A. E., Filippov, A. E., & Gorb, S. N. ``Insect wet steps:
ilippov, A. E., & Gorb, S. N. ``Insect wet steps: loss of fluid from insect feet adhering to a substrate,'' Journal of The Royal Society Interface, 10(78), (2013). Gecko Adhesion Bibliography
